topic: The cortisol-melatonin clock and how to fix it
caption: Did you know your body has an internal clock that controls cortisol and melatonin? 🕰️ Learn how to fix your cortisol-melatonin clock for better sleep and energy! 💤🌞 Here are the facts: cortisol peaks at 8am, melatonin at 10pm. 📊 Exposure to natural light boosts melatonin. 🌟 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💕 #healthrecode #cortisol #melatonin #sleep #energy
